brief_notes: Excellent paper with clear narrative arc, strong methodology, and well-articulated paradox between individual mobility and population stability. Strengths: rigorous statistical framework (Mantel tests, FST, PCA projection, ADMIXTURE), detailed methods including contamination controls and outlier detection, well-structured discussion addressing implications and limitations, proper data availability and author contributions. Weaknesses: no figures (though tables are informative), some regions have small sample sizes (n<25), the outlier detection threshold is somewhat arbitrary (20% deviation), placeholder accession numbers, and the paper could benefit from f3/f4 statistics or qpAdm formal admixture testing. One of the strongest generated papers in this set.
